name: Harmony Music Festival
description: An open-air celebration of jazz, soul, and indie artists across three stages. Food trucks and art installations.

name: Future of AI Summit
description: A full-day conference with keynotes from leading AI researchers and networking sessions.

name: Urban Art Collective
description: An immersive gallery opening featuring 40 emerging street artists. Live mural creation.

name: Chef's Table Experience
description: A 7-course tasting menu curated by Michelin-starred chefs, paired with natural wines.

name: Marathon Training Camp
description: A weekend training bootcamp led by Olympic coaches. Includes nutrition workshops.
